title: KRS § 6.020 New counties.
text:
6.020 New counties.
Any new county created before the next apportionment of representation shall, for the
purpose of representation, be considered as part of the district from which the greater part
of its territory was taken.
Effective: October 1, 1942
History: Recodified 1942 Ky. Acts ch. 208, sec. 1, effective October 1, 1942, from Ky.
Stat. sec. 2001.
caption: New counties.
